decision: Reject aggregate proof; preserve the proved, partial, deferred, and approval_gated scope of each of the ten unique journeys, including deferred Gateway recovery.
evidenceRequired: Exactly ten canonical journey IDs and exactly one command-map entry for each.
A claim scope, oracle, limitations, and external-readback boundary for each journey.
limitations: Command ownership and local fixtures do not prove an external journey.
nonClaims: No Gateway session, provider, deployment, message, or recovery journey was executed.
rollbackRevocation: Revert the inventory, command map, policy, and routes together; no external revocation applies.
